target.rawSql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM event_date) * 1000 as time,
    title as text,
    tags as tags
FROM events
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_date)
ORDER BY event_date

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    cu.country as "Pays",
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as "Commandes",
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA (€)",
    ROUND(AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) as "Panier moyen (€)"
FROM orders o
JOIN customers cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
  AND cu.country IN (${country:sqlstring})
GROUP BY cu.country
ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) DESC

SELECT
     $__timeGroupAlias(o.created_at, '1M'),
     COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as "Commandes",
     SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA (€)"
 FROM orders o
 JOIN customers cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id
 JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
 WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
   AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
   AND cu.country IN (${country:sqlstring})
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(o.created_at, '1d'),
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA"
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
AND c.name IN (${category:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
     c.name as "Catégorie",
     SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA réel (€)"
 FROM order_items oi
 JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
 JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
 JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
 WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
   AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
 GROUP BY c.name

SELECT COUNT(*) as nb_commandes
FROM orders
WHERE status != 'canceled'
AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as ca_total
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)

SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_total), 2) as panier_moyen
FROM (
  SELECT o.id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as order_total
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  WHERE o.status != 'canceled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
  GROUP BY o.id
) sub

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1d'),
    COUNT(*) as "Commandes"
FROM orders
WHERE status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(o.created_at + interval '365 days', '1d'),
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "Année précédente"
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND o.created_at >= $__timeFrom()::timestamp - interval '365 days'
  AND o.created_at < $__timeTo()::timestamp - interval '365 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(o.created_at, '1d'),
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "Chiffre d'affaires"
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) as "Heure", EXTRACT(DOW FROM created_at) as "Jour",
COUNT(*) as "Commandes"
FROM orders
WHERE status != 'cancelled'
AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '1M'), COUNT(*) as "Nouveaux clients"
FROM customers cu
WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) 
AND cu.country IN (${country:sqlstring})
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT name as "Produit", stock as "Stock"
FROM products p
WHERE p.name IN(${product:sqlstring} )
ORDER BY stock ASC

SELECT name as "Produit", stock as "Stock"
FROM products
ORDER BY stock ASC

SELECT
    p.name as "Produit",
    c.name as "Catégorie",
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA (€)",
    SUM(oi.quantity) as "Unités vendues",
    ROUND(AVG(oi.unit_price), 2) as "Prix moyen (€)"
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
  AND c.name IN(${category:sqlstring})
GROUP BY p.name, c.name
ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top des produits par chiffre d'affaires

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    c.name as "Catégorie",
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA (€)"
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) DESC

SELECT
    c.name as "Catégorie",
    SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) as "CA"
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status != 'cancelled'
  AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at)
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY c.name
